subcodes.first_line: Exalted is He Who hath sent down the verses from the Kingdom that was illumined by the lights of the Throne, and Who speaketh from the Lote-Tree of Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی الذی نزل الایات من ملکوت کان بانوار العرش مضیئا و ینطق فی سدره الوحی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @presence of; reunion with God, @chastisement and requital
